Logo, name and description all show in the Plugins tab now.

## Fixed
- The Plugins tab shows the **ShipLog** logo, name and description — the
  FanCtrlPlus way: the package ships a `README.md` (which Unraid renders as the
  name + description) and the logo under `images/`, and the plugin slug is
  lowercase so Unraid resolves both. **Settings and Community Apps** stay
  **ShipLog**. (v1.0.8 used a capital name, which showed the generic puzzle icon
  and no description.)

## Install / update
Remove + reinstall once to clear the older state, then it's fine:

```
removepkg shiplog
```
then Plugins → Install Plugin:
```
https://raw.githubusercontent.com/junkerderprovinz/shiplog/main/plugin/shiplog.plg
```
